creator: bor@univ.kiev.ua
text:
From http://rkhunter.sourceforge.net/ :

"Rootkit Hunter release 1.3.6 obsoletes all previous releases. Please upgrade real soon now."

Now in ports only 1.3.4

Also I ask for additional option for "etc/periodic/security/415.rkhunter"
like daily_rkhunter_check_option
OR
add --cronjob to options for rkhunter
